name: google-ads-optimization
description: Google Ads OPTIMIZATION skills for Inbound CPH: diagnose and improve LIVE client accounts. ads-audit (full paid-search audit → slide deck + PDF), annonce-optimering (post-launch RSA asset-hygiene diagnosis, champion-challenger coverage, feeds a gap-brief back into the setup plugin's responsive-search-ads), search-terms (search-terms-report analysis → colour-coded sheet + import-ready negative-keyword list), ads-aendringslog (build a changelog entry from Google Ads' own change-history, per client or per specialist across their accounts, collapse bulk uploads, format-matched draft to paste into the client's Drive changelog). All read-only against Google Ads (recommend-only, never writes to the account). For building NEW campaigns from scratch, see google-ads-setup. Danish-default.

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
